title: rosa arvensis var. glandulosa
intro: Rosa arvensis var. glandulosa, also known as the glandular field rose, is a variant of the Rosa arvensis plant species that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The glandular field rose has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is known to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, treating wounds, and providing relief from digestive issues. The glandular field rose can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for consumption, and it is also used in topical applications for skin issues and as a natural remedy for fever reduction.
